changes.comment: Add additive `escape?: 'html' | 'none' | ((value: string) => string)` option to `MustacheTemplate.create` for verbatim-passthrough and custom escape strategies (LLM-prompt rendering and other non-HTML targets). Implementation uses a per-instance `Mustache.Writer` with a resolved escape function; no mutation of the global `Mustache.escape`. Default `'html'` preserves existing behavior. `extractJsonText` confirmed as a stable public export from the `ai-assist` packlet.
